testcase.name: Trip planning — negative scenarios › origin input is empty by default
Trip planning — negative scenarios › destination input is empty by default
Trip planning — negative scenarios › origin input is empty after clearing
Trip planning — negative scenarios › destination input is empty after clearing
Trip planning — negative scenarios › cannot create a trip with both fields empty — shows validation errors on both inputs
Trip planning — negative scenarios › cannot create a trip with missing origin — shows validation error on origin
Trip planning — negative scenarios › cannot create a trip with missing destination — shows validation error on destination
Trip planning — negative scenarios › searching for a gibberish stop shows no place results
Trip planning — negative scenarios › searching with only whitespace shows no place results
Trip planning — happy path › trip creation modal is visible after clicking New Trip
Trip planning — happy path › modal contains origin and destination inputs
Trip planning — happy path › modal contains the Create trip button
Trip planning — happy path › Quick launch is selected by default
Trip planning — happy path › can fill in a starting point
Trip planning — happy path › can fill in a destination
Trip planning — happy path › modal closes and onboarding view appears after creating a trip
Trip planning — happy path › origin and destination appear as waypoints after creating a trip
Trip planning — happy path › Launch trip button is visible after creating a trip
Trip planning — happy path › can add a stop to the trip
Trip planning — happy path › trip has three waypoints after adding one stop
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › trip-planning.spec.ts:82:6 › Trip planning — happy path › trip has three waypoints after adding one stop
Error: expect(locator).toHaveCount(expected) failed
Locator: locator('#onboarding-view .onboarding-panel.additional .sidebar').locator('.waypoint-list').locator('.onboarding-waypoint-view') Expected: 3 Received: 2 Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveCount" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('#onboarding-view .onboarding-panel.additional .sidebar').locator('.waypoint-list').locator('.onboarding-waypoint-view') 9 × locator resolved to 2 elements - unexpected value "2"
at ../pages/trip-planner/trip-planner-asserter.ts:76
74 | await expect( 75 | this.tripPlannerPage.map.waypointList.locator(".onboarding-waypoint-view"), > 76 | ).toHaveCount(count); | ^ 77 | } 78 | 79 | async launchTripButtonIsVisible(): Promise<void> { at TripPlannerAsserter.waypointCountIs (/Users/istoychev/Documents/Personal Documents/projects /yamasoft-e2e-tests/e2e-tests-yamasoft/pages/trip-planner/trip-planner-asserter.ts:76:5) at /Users/istoychev/Documents/Personal Documents/projects /yamasoft-e2e-tests/e2e-tests-yamasoft/tests/trip-planning.spec.ts:86:34

testcase.name: Trip planning — happy path › can complete full trip planning flow: create, add stop, and launch
